snippet.description:

Tekst: @BakaPrase

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug

Hvala horu "ƒМarolija" ≈°to su otpevali najllep≈°e na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan

Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido

Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest

snippet.description:
izvr≈°ni producent: ƒР. ƒРOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

UkljuƒНi рЯФФ da dobija≈° obave≈°tenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuƒЗi cele noƒЗi maskiran
Svetom vlada ƒНudna epidemija
ƒМekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda pi≈°e LOCK DOWN,
Vidi≈° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ƒНini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ƒНekamo
Da me grli≈° hoƒЗu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Slu≈°aj malo doktore na vestima
≈†ta ƒЗe dalje biti ba≈° me zanima
ƒМekaj, hani, hani, da proƒСu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Jo≈° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reƒН
PuniƒНemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeƒН.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ƒРole ƒРogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ≈°to smo sami,
Ne mo≈Њemo vani
Zato doƒСi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok ima≈° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
рЯОµ Antonu
рЯОµ Marku D.
рЯОµ ≈љiki P.

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St GeorgeвАЩs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: Na veƒНeri kod: Bojan VaskoviƒЗ / sezona 2 / ep7
snippet.description:
SledeƒЗi domaƒЗin tima So koji ƒЗe u svom domu ugostiti ekipu Biber je Bojan VaskoviƒЗ, frontmen jednog od najpopularnijih bendova domaƒЗe muziƒНke scene - "Lexington".
Ovaj roƒСeni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinuƒСen da napusti rodni grad i ≈°ta je sve pro≈°ao dok se nije skuƒЗio u prestonici. NesuƒСenom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najva≈Њnija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ƒНega ume da se "zakaƒНi" sa svojom suprugom.
VideƒЗete kako se Bojan sna≈°ao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i za≈°to njegova lep≈°a polovina ka≈Њe da je tu, prvenstveno, odliƒНan degustator.

Duhovit i ≈°armantan, Bojan se pokazao kao veseo, raspevan i zabavan domaƒЗin Tijani DapƒНeviƒЗ, Zorani PaviƒЗ, Sanji VuƒНiƒЗ, Borisu PingoviƒЗu, Nigoru i Veljku KuzmanƒНeviƒЗu koji je svojim komentarima zabavio i svoju ekipu i domaƒЗine.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: Oko: Vladimir LeposaviƒЗ, ministar zbog ƒНije se izjave o Srebrenici drma Vlada Crna Gore
snippet.description:
Ko ƒЗe politiƒНki pre≈Њiveti: premijer KrivokapiƒЗ ili ministar LeposaviƒЗ i postoji li opcija da ponovo zajedno rade

Kada je izabrana vlada Zdravka KrivokapiƒЗa za ministra pravde Vladimira LeposaviƒЗa govorilo se da je blizak Mitropoliji crnogorsko-primorskoj. Citirali su njegovu biografiju, a u njoj stoji da je bio jedan od najboljih studenata beogradskog Pravnog fakulteta, da je bio stipendista Fondacije Robert ≈†uman, dobitnik Fulbrajtove nagrade, doktor prava.

Ipak poslednjih 15-ak dana o njemu se govori u drugaƒНijem kontekstu, deo politiƒНke elite u Podgorici zove ga negatorom genocida u Srebrenici i ƒНovekom koji relativizuje zloƒНine. Drugi deo elite ga brani, smatra da je politiƒНki stradao zbog verbalnog delikta. U mnogim crnogorskim gradovima ljudi su iza≈°li na ulice kada je Zdravko KrivokapiƒЗ pokrenuo proces njegove smene. I sada je vlada Zdravka KrivokapiƒЗa u najveƒЗoj krizi, pitanje je ko ƒЗe politiƒНki pre≈Њiveti - LeposaviƒЗ ili KrivokapiƒЗ. ≈†ta je taƒНno LeposaviƒЗ rekao na sednici Skup≈°tine Crne Gore 26. marta, ≈°ta misli o Srebrenici, ≈°ta o Ha≈°kom tribunalu i da li ƒЗe podneti ostavku.

Ekskluzivno za Oko govori ministar pravde i ljudskih i manjinskih prava u Vladi Crne Gore Vladimir LeposaviƒЗ. S njim razgovara Stevan KostiƒЗ.

Ipak poslednjih 15-ak dana o njemu se govori u drugaƒНijem kontekstu, deo politiƒНke elite u Podgorici zove ga negatorom genocida u Srebrenici i ƒНovekom koji relativizuje zloƒНine. Drugi deo elite ga brani, smatra da je politiƒНki stradao zbog verbalnog delikta. U mnogim crnogorskim gradovima ljudi su iza≈°li na ulice kada je Zdravko KrivokapiƒЗ pokrenuo proces njegove smene. I sada je vlada Zdravka KrivokapiƒЗa u najveƒЗoj krizi, pitanje je ko ƒЗe politiƒНki pre≈Њiveti - LeposaviƒЗ ili KrivokapiƒЗ. ≈†ta je taƒНno LeposaviƒЗ rekao na sednici Skup≈°tine Crne Gore 26. marta, ≈°ta misli o Srebrenici, ≈°ta o Ha≈°kom tribunalu i da li ƒЗe podneti ostavku.

Ekskluzivno za Oko govori ministar pravde i ljudskih i manjinskih prava u Vladi Crne Gore Vladimir LeposaviƒЗ. S njim razgovara Stevan KostiƒЗ.

snippet.title: Ne≈°to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ƒНas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskr≈°njih jaja na ovaj naƒНin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, ne≈Њne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove ne≈Њnije su mi dra≈Њe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskr≈°nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPA≈љ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite pra≈°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punƒНa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaƒЗi jo≈° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliƒНno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunƒСerom skinite peƒНat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ≈°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola ka≈°iƒНice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok mo≈Њe bilo koji drugi.

localized.title: Ne≈°to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ƒНas! Easter eggs.
localized.description:
Farbanje uskr≈°njih jaja na ovaj naƒНin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, ne≈Њne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove ne≈Њnije su mi dra≈Њe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskr≈°nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPA≈љ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite pra≈°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punƒНa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaƒЗi jo≈° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliƒНno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunƒСerom skinite peƒНat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ≈°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola ka≈°iƒНice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok mo≈Њe bilo koji drugi.

snippet.title: KrivokapiƒЗ u verbalnom sukobu sa ƒНelnicima DF-a
snippet.description:
Premijer Crne Gore Zdravko KrivokapiƒЗ napustio je sinoƒЗnji sastanak sa predstavnicima vladajuƒЗe veƒЗine nakon verbalnog sukoba sa ƒНelnicima Demokratskog fronta.

Iz DF-a je saop≈°teno da na sastanku nije bilo pomaka u odnosu na krizu vlade, izazvanu odlukom KrivokapiƒЗa da tra≈Њi razrje≈°enje ministra pravde Vladimira LeposaviƒЗa zbog izjave da ƒЗe priznati genocid u Srebrenici tek kada se nedvosmisleno utvrdi. Front je ranije najavio da neƒЗe glasati za smjenu LeposaviƒЗa, a na sastanku su, kako su rekli, tra≈Њili da se premijer pomiri sa ministrom.

Premijer Zdravko KrivokapiƒЗ poruƒНio je da je napustio sastanak jer ne dozvoljava podmetanje i neistine. Kako je napisao na Twitteru - dosta je bilo la≈Њi radi sticanja politiƒНkih poena.

#CrnaGora

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - weвАЩve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, weвАЩre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As youвАЩd expect, MatвАЩs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, weвАЩve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although itвАЩs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider itвАЩs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, itвАЩs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, thereвАЩs only one way to find outвА¶ LETвАЩS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Emanet 160. B√ґl√Љm | Legacy Episode 160
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare:

snippet.title: Emanet 159. B√ґl√Љm | Legacy Episode 159
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.description:

0:00 Molly Qerim Rose shares the Jamal Murray news.
0:50 Stephen A. Smith does not give the Denver Nuggets a chance at making the NBA Finals.

snippet.title: Emanet 158. B√ґl√Љm | Legacy Episode 158
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: ≈†eherezada popularna torta sa turskim keksom koju morate praviti (BEZ PEƒМENJA) keks - puding torta.
snippet.description:
Popularna i tra≈Њena torta sa turskim keksom, bez peƒНenja. Gotova za ƒНas.
#turskikeks #≈°eherezada #torta
bez pecenja
nepecena torta
torta sa keskom
torta sa pudingom
PISANI RECEPT NA BLOGU: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/seherezada-torta-sa-turskim-keksom.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 2 pakovanja turskog keksa

- 5 kesica pudinga od karamele (kesica je od 40 gr.)

- 1,700 ml. mleka + 400 ml. da se umuti ≈°lag

- 250 gr. maslaca ili margarina

- 200 gr. ≈°eƒЗera

- 300 gr. ≈°laga sa ukusom slatke pavlake

- 500 ml. slatke pavlake (za oblaganje torte)



Upr≈Њite ≈°eƒЗer i nalijte mleko. Ostavite malo mleka da razmutite puding (oko 300 - 400 ml). Kuvajte sve dok se karamelizovani ≈°eƒЗer ne istopi.

Zakuvajte puding koji ste razmutili u mleku. Fil sklonite sa ringle i ostavite da se hladi.

Umutite maslac ili margarin pa ume≈°ajte mikserom u puding koji ste predhodno razmutili mikserom.

Umutite i ≈°lag sa 400 ml. hladnog mleka. Filujte: keks, fil, ≈°lag, keks, fil, ≈°lag, keks, fil, ≈°lag, keks, fil i umuƒЗena slatka pavlaka.

Ostavite tortu da se stegne pa je poslu≈Њite. Prijatno!
